text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Career Counseling * Deafness 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Blindness Deafness Migrants Seasonal Workers Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential and day school for children who are deaf or hard of hearing. Also offers vocational and career education and an adult transition program for graduates. 999 Locust Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 3-21 who are eligible for special education in Oregon because they are Deaf or Hard of Hearing Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Email (503) 400-6180 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF
